description: CompositionBlue shorts with built-in briefs, made of 86% polyster and 14% spandex, has a grey mesh along the length of  the legs, comfortable elastic waist band with drawstring, inner pocket, a zipper pocket at the back, and the logo on the leftFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not use softeners Do not bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry inside-out in shade Do not iron Do not dry clean If you love gymming but hate it when you get sweaty while working out, here's help coming your way. These blue shorts from nike's Dri-Fit range absorb sweat as you exercise; and since they look so hip, you are going to look really cool as you run on the treadmill. The mesh lining on both sides provide for greater ventilation and comfort. The elastic waist band is soft and broad, so you don't have to bother about angry red marks all along your waist, while the drawstring provides a more personalized fit. You can stash away some cash in the inner pocket, or maybe even in the very stylish back zipper pocket. Wear it with t-shirts from the nike Dri-fit range, put on a pair of running shoes, grab your iPod, and you're ready to go!
